59.reason: [The regex for removing block comments is incorrect: "(.|\\R)*?" does not properly match across lines in all cases and may leave parts of block comments, leading to incorrect tokenization or missed errors.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The regex for removing block comments is incorrect: "(.|\\R)*?" does not properly match across lines in all cases and may leave parts of block comments, leading to incorrect tokenization or missed errors.]

81.reason: [The character constant pattern '(\\\\'|\\\\0|[^'\\\\])' is incomplete—it doesn't handle other valid escape sequences like \\n, \\t, etc., as defined later in the code, causing valid char constants to be misclassified or missed. Also, the regex includes standalone '&' and '|' inside the [...] which causes them to be matched as tokens even when they appear alone, but the error detection only triggers if they are captured as full tokens—however, due to regex ordering, "&&" and "||" must be matched before single "&" or "|", but the current regex places single symbols in a character class that may match them prematurely.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The character constant pattern '(\\\\'|\\\\0|[^'\\\\])' is incomplete—it doesn't handle other valid escape sequences like \\n, \\t, etc., as defined later in the code, causing valid char constants to be misclassified or missed. Also, the regex includes standalone '&' and '|' inside the [...] which causes them to be matched as tokens even when they appear alone, but the error detection only triggers if they are captured as full tokens—however, due to regex ordering, "&&" and "||" must be matched before single "&" or "|", but the current regex places single symbols in a character class that may match them prematurely.]
